title: Home
left_blurbs: Welcome to my personal corner of the web...
...a place for my projects, my writing, and my bird photography.
right_content: Welcome to my homepage. I'm glad you found us. This site is a home for my work as a developer and bird photographer. Have a look around — there's always something new being added.
Take a look at my projects. I'm always building something new, so check back often to see what I've been working on.
If you're interested in what I've been thinking about lately, head over to the blog. I write about development, photography, and whatever else is on my mind.
I'm also a bird photographer. You can browse my collection on the bird photos page. New photos are added regularly as I get out in the field.
